author: brusale
body:
#### PR description:

This PR introduces:
- 3D pattern recognition algorithms in the barrel within the TICL framework. Pattern recognition by CLUE3D and FastJet can be used in the barrel
- SimTracksters creation in the barrel region
- Trackster to SimTrackster associator (templated on the corresponding hits)
- offline validation plots (basic set of plots)
- addition of the barrel Tracksters, SimTracksters and associators to the TICLDumper
- HLT modules for Tracksters 

Everything above runs with the `ticl_barrel` process modifier.

#### PR validation:
Tested with wfs `34553.209` and `347553.209`. 
HLT sequences tested with 

```
hltPhase2IntegrationTests --globaltag auto:phase2_realistic_T35 --geometry ExtendedRun4D121 --era Phase2C17I13M9  --procModifiers ticl_barrel
```

@felicepantaleo @waredjeb @AuroraPerego @valsdav
title: TICL-barrel: 3D Pattern recognition in the barrel
